segments.text: [Music]
you can now use sonar analysis in
compiler Explorer to keep your code
clean even in the browser
if you're having trouble debugging code
boiling it down to a minimum example you
can capture in compiler Explorer it's a
great way to share it with others you
might be able to help well now you can
include sonar in that conversation too
imagine you're working on some UI code a
can't work out why your components Z
order doesn't seem to be what you pass
in let's add sonar analysis and see what
it thinks well quite a bit as it happens
now we can see Zed order mentioned down
here
it's uninitialized when passed to widget
due to ordering rules
we can also see the X and Y member
variables have initialization order
issues as well and if we click on it we
can see each stage of the issue
highlighted with a number that
corresponds to the description down here
initialization and C plus is hard we
need all the help we can get
[Music]

fullText: [Music] you can now use sonar analysis in compiler Explorer to keep your code clean even in the browser if you're having trouble debugging code boiling it down to a minimum example you can capture in compiler Explorer it's a great way to share it with others you might be able to help well now you can include sonar in that conversation too imagine you're working on some UI code a can't work out why your components Z order doesn't seem to be what you pass in let's add sonar analysis and see what it thinks well quite a bit as it happens now we can see Zed order mentioned down here it's uninitialized when passed to widget due to ordering rules we can also see the X and Y member variables have initialization order issues as well and if we click on it we can see each stage of the issue highlighted with a number that corresponds to the description down here initialization and C plus is hard we need all the help we can get [Music]
